title: Brazilian Cheese Croquettes
description: A crispy, cheesy snack inspired by Brazilian cuisine. Piquant cheese adds a tangy twist.
instructions: 1. Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine shredded piquant cheese, grated cheese, breadcrumbs, and beaten egg.
3. Mix well and add crushed croquette.
4. Using your hands, shape the mixture into small balls.
5. When oil is hot, carefully add the cheese croquettes.
6. Fry for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Drain excess oil on paper towels.
